three_xxx_coverage_check.note: A true result means every 3xxx historical manual-compact ID has either a private-candidate action, a completed review record, or an explicit hold. Final completion is instead all_rows_resolved=true; any runtime-token hold keeps that result false. It never means a Steam install occurred.
